Subject: NCM-P-2025-08-11 Closed-End Second Product Enhancements from Newfi and Deephaven
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-08-11 12:50:10-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

Do you have a borrower who would like to tap into their equity without losing their current, low rate? A closed-end second is the ideal solution. Fixed rates, a variety of terms, and two investors that also offer options for second homes and investment properties. Capital Markets is excited to introduce the product enhancements from Deephaven and Newfi!

Channel: Banked

Product Type: Closed-end seconds

 Newfi <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/EpO3MslB77pNlAWu5TWA77QB8XRlU_TwkUk0KcvEH1bR2w?e=YNO2AC> 

 Deephaven CES <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/EqX7m48OkNFBnbJSdDf5tl0By0KuPM-wsMiaGm9xhTSPEw?e=hWbURa>
